title: BetterAI BTA
description: This mod make BetterThanAdventure's mob more smarter with Babric!
body:
This mod is simple. BetterThanAdventure's mob's ai more complex(almost)!

also as you modder, you can use as library!


## Required mod

Babric Requied! [https://github.com/Turnip-Labs/babric-instance-repo](https://github.com/Turnip-Labs/babric-instance-repo)

## Modder Info

IPathGetter is using pathfinding controll. don't use IPath class It self!

and IBlockPathGetter. It use on block and set BlockPath
